notes: Revised the public homepage to focus on calendar time, competing goals, first-step prompts, and paper tasklists rather than backend structure.
Simplified Pathmark Online Home so guidance now lives in the relevant Areas, Routines, Goals, Tasklist and export sections.

Improved user-facing guidance for Areas as Google subcalendars, routines as capacity-protecting habits, goals as closure criteria plus next actions, and Google Tasks prompts as first-step friction reducers.
Changed Google Calendar colour selection to user-facing colour names with swatches, while still storing the correct Google Calendar colour codes for export.
Reframed the printable PDF tasklist as the paper alternative to Google Tasks prompts for users who prefer ticking things off by hand.
